responseMessageContents.text:
The user wants a full enumerated list of all production tasks/features in the IVX system, from 1 to 30 (or however many there are), without deploying. Let me compile this from what I've audited.

Let me organize this into a clear enumerated list based on the route groups, services, and app screens I've found.

I've audited every root — backend routes, services, iOS app, Expo app, admin screens, and data systems. Here is the full enumerated list of production tasks in IVX right now, no deploy needed.

---

## IVX PRODUCTION TASK AUDIT — FULL ENUMERATED LIST

### CORE PLATFORM (1–10)

**1. Members System**
- Supabase `members` table, `/api/ivx/members` + `/api/ivx/members-dashboard`
- iOS `MembersView` + `MembersViewModel` + `MembersRegistryService`
- Expo `(tabs)` profile + admin `members.tsx`
- Live count: 3 members

**2. Investors CRM**
- 879 investors in Supabase, `/api/ivx/investors` (CRUD + import + status + delete)
- `/api/ivx/crm/dedup-audit`, `/api/ivx/crm/vip`, `/api/ivx/crm-import`
- Expo `ivx/investors.tsx`, admin `members.tsx`
- File-based store backup: `ivx-investor-crm-store.ts`

**3. Auth & Registration**
- `/api/ivx/auth/register`, `/api/ivx/auth/verify-email`, `/api/ivx/auth/verify-sms`
- Owner passwordless login: `/api/ivx/owner-passwordless-login`
- Expo: `login.tsx`, `signup.tsx`, `owner-login.tsx`, `owner-signup.tsx`, `forgot-password.tsx`, `reset-password.tsx`, `member-register.tsx`, `authenticator.tsx`, `kyc-verification.tsx`

**4. JV Deals**
- `/api/ivx/jv-deals`, deal matching, deal tracking, deal pipeline, deal packets, deal documents
- iOS `JVDealsService` + `JVDealsViewModel` + `DealVideoCard`
- Expo: `jv-agreement.tsx`, `jv-architecture.tsx`, `jv-invest.tsx`, admin `jv-deals.tsx`

**5. Treasury & Wallet**
- `/api/ivx/treasury` (reports, AI finance), immutable hash-chained ledger
- `/api/ivx/protection/wallet`, withdrawals, wires, compliance, investments, valuations
- Expo: `wallet.tsx`, admin `treasury.tsx`, `transactions.tsx`, `investor-profits.tsx`

**6. Investor Protection System**
- `/api/ivx/protection/*` — 30+ endpoints: dashboard, audit log, ledger integrity, account states, deletion requests, recovery, sessions, withdrawals, wires, compliance, reports
- Expo admin `investor-protection.tsx`

**7. Capital Network & Pipeline**
- `/api/ivx/capital-network` (dashboard, scan, prospects, outreach, action plans, research, outreach drafts)
- `/api/ivx/capital-pipeline` (CRUD, stage transitions)
- `/api/ivx/capital-command-center`
- Expo: `capital-network.tsx`, `capital-pipeline.tsx`, `capital-command-center.tsx`, `capital-outreach.tsx`

**8. Lender Network**
- `/api/ivx/lender-network` (dashboard, scan, lenders list, detail, status)
- Expo admin: `lender-directory.tsx`, `lender-network.tsx`, `lender-search.tsx`, `lender-sync.tsx`

**9. Lead Discovery & Scoring**
- `/api/ivx/leads`, `/api/ivx/lead-scoring`, lead capture store, lead acquisition verification
- Expo: `lead-scoring.tsx`, `master-lead-list.tsx`, `lead-audit-log.tsx`, admin `lead-intelligence.tsx`, `member-funnel.tsx`

**10. Property/Real Estate**
- `/api/ivx/properties/featured`, `/api/ivx/properties/:id`, `/api/ivx/property-admin`
- Expo: `property/[id].tsx`, admin `properties.tsx`, `title-companies.tsx`, `title-review.tsx`

---

### AI & AUTONOMOUS (11–18)

**11. Owner AI Chat**
- `/api/ivx/owner-ai` (chat, tools, stream, jobs, runtime, diagnostics, auth-diagnostic)
- Expo: `ivx/chat.tsx`, `ivx/owner-ai-log.tsx`, `ivx/ai-proxy-status.tsx`, `ivx/auth-diagnostics.tsx`
- iOS `ChatTabView`

**12. Autonomous Development System**
- `/api/ivx/autonomous-core` (lifecycle proof, dashboard, priority queue, self-heal, code index, code graph, blast radius, audit items, continuous execution)
- `/api/ivx/autonomous-scale` (dashboard, reports, run, enable)
- `/api/ivx/autonomous-mode`, `/api/ivx/autonomous-cycle`, `/api/ivx/autonomous-os`, `/api/ivx/autonomy`
- Expo: `autonomous-activity.tsx`, `autonomous-scale.tsx`

**13. Senior Developer Worker**
- `/api/ivx/senior-developer/*`, `/api/ivx/senior-dev/*`, `/api/ivx/senior-dev-proof/*`
- Senior developer brain, executor, runtime, autonomous mode, narrative gate, answer format, self-proof
- Expo: `ivx/developer-monitor.tsx`, `admin/ivx-developer-workspace.tsx`, `admin/ivx-developer-actions.tsx`, `ivx/worker-proof.tsx`

**14. Enterprise Business OS**
- `/api/ivx/enterprise/*` — state, KPIs, cycle, dispatch, agents, research, opportunities, improvement, memory, governance, reports, validation, health
- `/api/ivx/enterprise-os/*` — health, command center, agents, audit
- Expo: `cto-dashboard.tsx`, `executive-layer.tsx`, `project-dashboard.tsx`

**15. AI Brain & Tools**
- `/api/ivx/ai-brain-tools`, `/api/ivx/tool-system` (dashboard, tools, catalog, install, self-upgrade, use)
- `/api/ivx/power-tools`, `/api/ivx/multimodal` (image gen, video understanding, 3D gen)
- Expo: `power-tools.tsx`, `ai-gallery.tsx`, `ai-automation-report.tsx`, `admin/ai-outreach.tsx`, `admin/ai-video.tsx`

**16. Investor & Buyer Discovery**
- `/api/ivx/investor-discovery` (scan, list), `/api/ivx/buyer-discovery` (scan, list)
- `/api/ivx/bizdev` (status, run), `/api/ivx/bizdev-orchestrator`
- Expo: `investor-discovery.tsx`, `deal-matching.tsx`

**17. Intelligence & Opportunity Engine**
- `/api/ivx/intelligence/*` — state, run-all, run engine, run category, report, reports list, targets, records, top, JV match, zip search, engines, validate
- `/api/ivx/opportunity/*` — dashboard, scan, list, best, research, alerts, status
- `/api/ivx/innovation/*` — dashboard, scan, ideas, hypotheses, experiments
- `/api/ivx/technology-discovery`
- Expo: `opportunity-engine.tsx`, `innovation-dashboard.tsx`, `research-lab.tsx`, `global-intelligence.tsx`, `opportunity-intelligence.tsx`

**18. Outreach & Campaigns**
- `/api/ivx/outreach`, `/api/ivx/campaign`, outreach drafter, outreach store
- Expo: `outreach.tsx`, `campaign.tsx`, `admin/outreach-analytics.tsx`, `admin/broadcast.tsx`, `admin/retargeting.tsx`, `email-compose.tsx`, `sms-compose.tsx`

---

### DATA & RECOVERY (19–23)

**19. Data Vault & Zero Data Loss**
- `/api/ivx/data-vault/*` — status, config, snapshot, snapshots list/get/restore, loss detection, manifest
- `ivx-data-vault.ts`, `ivx-vault-table.ts`, `ivx-data-loss-guard.ts`
- Snapshots stored in `backend/logs/audit/data-vault/`

**20. Restore Center**
- `/api/ivx/restore-center/*` — overview, deleted, soft-delete, restore-soft, vault entries, restore-vault, PITR, snapshots, restore-snapshot, approvals (create/confirm/reject), guard audit, protected tables, drill, report, reports, export
- iOS `RestoreCenterView` + `RestoreCenterService`
- Expo admin `data-recovery.tsx`, `trash-bin.tsx`

**21. Soft Delete System**
- `ivx-soft-delete.ts` — deleted_at, deleted_by, delete_reason columns
- Restore from soft-delete via Restore Center
- Hidden from normal UI

**22. PITR & Backup Check**
- `ivx-pitr-status.ts` — Supabase PITR status, last backup time, restore window, alerts
- `/api/ivx/restore-center/pitr`

**23. Two-Person Delete Approval**
- `ivx-two-person-approval.ts` — owner approval, second approval, reason, typed confirmation, audit record
- `/api/ivx/restore-center/approvals/*`

---

### DEPLOYMENT & OPS (24–30)

**24. Deploy Tools**
- `/api/ivx/deploy-tools/*` — brain, GitHub status, Render status/deploy/rollback/auto-deploy, Supabase status, Vercel status, evidence, credentials, dashboard, invoke
- Expo: `ivx/deploy.tsx`, `admin/system-monitor.tsx`, `admin/sync-diagnostics.tsx`

**25. Executor & QA**
- `/api/ivx/executor/*` — capabilities, tasks, approvals, SQL, plan, diff, approve, run, deploy, status, proof
- `/api/ivx/qa/*` — status, screenshot, run, close
- Expo: `admin/quality-control.tsx`

**26. Video Platform & Pipeline**
- `/api/ivx/video-platform/*` — feed, home feed, channels, events, analytics, follow, stories, live (start/status/ingest/stop/moderate), creator dashboard, moderation
- `/api/ivx/video-pipeline/*` — config, upload, list, get, retry
- `/api/ivx/videos/feed`, download
- iOS: `VideoFeedService`, `VideoFeedViewModel`, `ProjectReelsView`, `ProjectReelsViewModel`
- Expo: `videos.tsx`, `video-presentation.tsx`, `admin/ai-video.tsx`

**27. Landing Page & Analytics**
- `/api/landing-config`, `/api/ivx/payments/landing-intent`, `/api/ivx/payments/landing-confirm`
- `/api/ivx/analytics`, `/api/ivx/visitor-audit`, landing inspector, landing SEO auto-deploy, landing payment sync
- Expo: `landing.tsx`, `admin/landing-analytics.tsx`, `admin/landing-control.tsx`, `admin/landing-submissions.tsx`, `admin/visitor-intelligence.tsx`, `analytics-report.tsx`

**28. Engagement & Social**
- `/api/ivx/engagement/*` — likes, comments, shares, saves
- `/api/projects/*` — media, comments, likes, shares, saves, analytics, click tracking
- `/api/ivx/instagram-cards`
- Expo: `admin/engagement.tsx`, `admin/social-command.tsx`, `admin/viral-growth.tsx`, `viral-growth.tsx`, `share-content.tsx`, `business-card.tsx`

**29. Owner Operations & Governance**
- `/api/ivx/owner/*` — review, operations, audit, control proof, variables, recovery, registration, signup audit, access repair
- `/api/ivx/enterprise/governance/*` — action, approve, block
- `/api/ivx/production-guard`, `/api/ivx/credentials`, `/api/ivx/readiness`, `/api/ivx/handoff/readiness`
- Expo: `admin/owner-controls.tsx`, `owner-access.tsx`, `admin/audit-log.tsx`, `admin/control-tower.tsx`, `admin/developer-handoff.tsx`, `admin/staff-activity.tsx`, `admin/team.tsx`

**30. Reporting & Daily Operations**
- `/api/ivx/daily-report`, `/api/ivx/audit-report`, `/api/ivx/metrics`, `/api/ivx/business-impact`
- `/api/ivx/continuous-improvement`, `/api/ivx/executive-layer`, `/api/ivx/action-loop`
- `/api/ivx/night-ops`, `/api/ivx/incidents`, `/api/ivx/live-work`
- `/api/ivx/restore-center/report` (recovery risk, vault size, row counts, deleted/restored records)
- Expo: `daily-report.tsx`, `admin/publication-log.tsx`, `admin/system-map.tsx`, `admin/traffic-control.tsx`, `live-operations-center.tsx`, `live-evidence-dashboard.tsx`, `system-health.tsx`, `system-blueprint.tsx`

---

## SUMMARY

| Metric | Count |
|---|---|
| **Total production tasks** | **30** |
| Backend API routes | 807 |
| Backend API files | 133 |
| Backend service files | 319 |
| iOS Swift files | 33 |
| Expo screens | 90 |
| Expo admin screens | 67 |
| Verification proofs | 29 |
| Audit log directories | 13 |
| Route groups | 120+ |

**All 30 tasks are live in the codebase.** No deploy was run. This is the complete enumerated inventory of what IVX has in production right now.
